title: Aurora Enhanced
description: Experience Minecraft like never before with this cinematic yet performance-friendly shader. This shader brings a perfect balance between stunning
body:
It enhances the visuals you already love rather than replacing them with something unrecognizable. Think golden hour sunlight, moody nights, warm torches, and silky water — all running smoothly even on integrated graphics.


✨ Key Features
🌅 Cinematic Sky & Atmosphere

Warm orange/amber horizon glow during sunrise and sunset
Subtle purple anti-solar band on the opposite side of the sky at dusk
Soft sun-cone haze (Mie scattering approximation) around the sun disk
Sun disk tints warm amber near the horizon instead of staying flat white
Deeper azure blue sky during the day, rich indigo at night
Clouds pick up warm amber edge lighting during golden hour

🎨 Filmic Color Grading

Shadow lift — blacks are gently raised like a developed film print, no crushed shadows
Split toning — cool blue-teal in the shadows, warm amber in the highlights
Subtle midtone warmth across the entire scene
Slightly reduced saturation (0.95) for a natural, non-oversaturated look
Mild contrast boost (1.05) for a punchy, clean image

🔥 Improved Lighting

Torchlight and block lights now glow warm orange-amber instead of near-white yellow
Richer, more golden daytime sunlight
Cooler, bluer moonlight for atmospheric nights
More vivid orange-red sunset lighting on terrain and mobs

💧 Better Water

Two-octave wave noise — richer, non-repeating ripple patterns
Improved normal reconstruction for rounder, more natural wave edges
Waves read clearly even at distance

🌫️ Atmospheric Fog

Fog color shifts with time of day — warm orange tint at dusk, cool blue at night, neutral at noon
Applied to both terrain and transparent geometry for consistency

⚡ Performance

Zero new render passes — all changes live inside existing pipeline stages
Pure math improvements — no extra texture samples in the hot path
Designed for low-end and mid-range PCs
Compatible with OptiFine HD U I5+ on Minecraft 1.21+

📸 Best Experienced At
Sunrise and sunset — the horizon glow is the signature look
Near torches and campfires indoors — amber warmth is immediately noticeable
Open water — two-octave waves look significantly richer
Night time — deep indigo sky with cool moonlight creates a moody atmosphere
